note.e: *Advisory 130 km/h. Play streets = walking pace. Towing: 80.

items.e: From 0.3‰ you can be punished if you drive unsafely or crash.
items.d: Ab 0,3‰ bei Auffälligkeit oder Unfall strafbar.

items.e: No signs or lights at the junction? Traffic from your right goes first.
items.d: Keine Schilder/Ampel? Verkehr von rechts hat Vorfahrt.

items.e: Signs, lights and police override this default.
items.d: Schilder, Ampel und Polizei heben die Regel auf.

items.e: Turning left? Yield to oncoming traffic.
Safe gap ≈ half your speedometer in metres (100 km/h → 50 m).
items.d: Abstand ≈ halber Tacho in Metern (100 km/h → 50 m).

items.e: In town: about a 2-second gap.
Overtake on the left only.
Dipped beam in tunnels, fog, rain & snow.
Rear fog light only when visibility < 50 m.
No full beam with oncoming traffic.
Seatbelt mandatory in every seat.
Phone hands-free only.
Child seat until 12 yrs or 150 cm.
Carry triangle, vest, first-aid kit.
In a jam, form the Rettungsgasse immediately.
Halten = brief stop. Parken = leave / >3 min.
Park on the right, with traffic flow.
Keep 5 m from corners & crossings.
Traffic inside has priority.
No indicator entering; indicate right leaving.
Most cities are a green-badge zone (Umweltzone).
No valid badge in the zone = fine.
items.d: Ohne Plakette in der Zone = Bußgeld.

items.e: Blue light + siren: pull right, make way.
Bus leaving a stop with indicator: let it out.
items.d: Bus mit Blinker an der Haltestelle: rauslassen.

items.e: Lasts 2 years from the first licence.
0.0‰ alcohol, any age.
Serious offence → extension + course.
